content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know these three Dao Ancestor incarnations, after all, there were so many Dao Ancestors, and it was impossible for him to recognize them all.

But he was sure that these three Dao Ancestor incarnations had absolutely bad intentions, which could be seen from the hostility on each other.

"I don't know what the three Dao Ancestors stopped me about?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hand over the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, but spare you from dying!"

One of the Dao Ancestor incarnations spoke.

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said, "Three Dao Ancestors, I only have one Heaven Splitting God Pillar, and there are three of you, who should I hand it over?"

"Don't sow discord!" one of the Dao Ancestor incarnations said with a smile: "You shouldn't know us, otherwise you wouldn't ask such a question, the three of us are the three Great Dao Ancestors of one organization, you may have heard of this organization, it is the Ten Killings Organization!"

"Ten Killings!"

Ye Tian had naturally heard of this organization, it was a force as notorious as the Dark Temple, but it was not as powerful as the Dark Temple, because the Ten Killings Organization did not have top Dao Ancestors, they were all forces composed of some ordinary Dao Ancestors.

It is said that the Ten Killings Organization has ten ordinary Dao Ancestors, a large number of True Ancestors and countless True Monarchs, and they also have a certain amount of influence in the chaos, but because they do not have top Dao Ancestors, they cannot compete with those real top forces at all.

For example, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor alone can suppress the Ten Killings Organization!

Seeing that the three of them were Dao Ancestors of the same organization, Ye Tian knew that it was useless for him to sow discord, after all, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar did not greatly improve his personal strength, but was more important to the forces, so it was impossible for these three Dao Ancestors to kill each other.

In that case, he will not hide it.

"Three Dao Ancestors, please leave immediately, otherwise your avatar will stay here forever!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Dare to threaten us?"

The three Dao Ancestors of the Ten Killing Organization were furious.

As Dao Ancestors, how could they ever put the little True Monarch in their eyes?

The true monarch is an ant to them, but if the ant threatens them, it is to provoke and despise them, which is a great sin!

Rumble!

The three Dao Ancestors took action one after another, vowing to kill Ye Tian, although they would offend the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor because of this, but the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor would not kill the Ten Kills Organization for the sake of a personal disciple!

After all, in the long years, the Void Heaven Pulse has also fallen a lot of personal disciples, if every time a personal disciple dies, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor will personally take action, then how is it possible!

As for the Void Heaven One Vein will target the Ten Killing Organization, they are not afraid of the Ten Killing Organization.

"Imprisoned!"

A powerful Origin Divine Power acted on Ye Tian's body, trying to imprison Ye Tian.

Then, another soul attack origin divine power attacked Ye Tian, and a powerful attack origin divine power also hit Ye Tian.

One is imprisoned, two are soul attacks, and three are direct attacks.

It can be said that the three Dao Ancestor incarnations cooperate very tacitly, and their power far exceeds that of one Dao Ancestor incarnation.

One plus one plus one doesn't add up to three, but three times!

If his strength was only comparable to that of an ordinary Dao Ancestor incarnation, Ye Tian might not even have a chance to fight back, and he would be directly killed by the three Great Dao Ancestor incarnations.

"Sky Splitting Pillar!"

Ye Tian summoned the Void of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, and the terrifying coercion directly lifted the confinement.

Then, Ye Tian augmented himself with the phantom of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar and cast the Yin and Yang Pole Knife.

Burst!

The Yin and Yang Polar Blade instantly slashed through the body of one of the Dao Ancestor incarnations, cutting it in half.

Dao Ancestor's incarnated powerful flesh body was described as a void under the Yin and Yang Pole Sword, and it couldn't compete with such a powerful Origin Divine Power at all.

Of course, the Dao Ancestor incarnation will not be directly killed by the Yin and Yang Pole Knife, and the Dao Ancestor incarnation is not so weak.

Wow!

This Dao Ancestor incarnation urged Dao power, and the two halves of his body instantly healed.

The fight continues!

Ye Tian's strength itself was above the ordinary Dao Ancestor incarnation, coupled with the threefold increase in the strength of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar Dao Inscription, his combat power far exceeded that of the ordinary Dao Ancestor incarnation.

Even if these three Dao Ancestor incarnations joined forces to besiege Ye Tian, they were not Ye Tian's opponents, and Ye Tian was able to tear apart the flesh of a Dao Ancestor incarnation with every attack.

The difference in strength between the two sides is too big, unless it is a group of Dao Ancestor incarnations who besiege and kill Ye Tian, there is no way to help Ye Tian at all.

"How is it possible, in the end, we are Dao Ancestors, or are he Dao Ancestors!"

The three Dao Ancestor incarnations were completely speechless.

They were also shocked by Ye Tian's amazing combat power, this was simply unreasonable!

Even though they have rich combat experience, a higher understanding of the Great Dao, and a more handy use of the Origin Divine Power, Ye Tian's power is too terrifying, it is simply a force to break through ten thousand laws, the terrifying power accelerates the increase of the Origin Divine Power, and the attack power is too terrifying!

Just as the three Dao Ancestor incarnations were about to escape, Ye Tian used the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to seal the void, plus a half-Dao weapon-level space half-Dao weapon, completely fixed the space.

The battlefield ruins were not easy to break the space, and they were blocked by Ye Tian, and the three Dao Ancestor incarnations could not break the space at all and leave, so they could only fly away slowly.

But Ye Tian's speed was faster than theirs, and they couldn't escape at all.

If they fled separately, they would not be able to stop Ye Tian alone, and they would be easily killed.

But as the battle reached the back, the three Dao Ancestors used all their means, and they only slightly injured Ye Tian, and they were already seriously injured and dying.

"Let's run away separately, one can escape!"

The three Dao Ancestor incarnations glanced at each other and said helplessly.

If you flee separately, you will definitely not be able to escape, at most one will escape, but it is better than the annihilation of the whole army.

"I hope this avatar can be saved!"

The three Dao Ancestor incarnations thought to each other.

Whew!!

The three Dao Ancestor incarnations flew in three directions, and Ye Tian reacted quickly, without any entanglement, and directly killed one of the Dao Ancestor incarnations.

Rumble!

A blow shook the air, directly shaking one of the Dao Ancestor incarnations into a blood mist, and just when the other party wanted to recondense his body, the Yin and Yang Pole Knife broke it up again.

Under the round of attacks, this Dao Ancestor incarnation completely dissipated.

Then, Ye Tian chased after the second Dao Ancestor incarnation, and quickly killed him.

At this time, the third Dao Ancestor incarnation had already escaped a long distance and was constantly shuttling through space.

But in a place like the battlefield ruins, every time you travel through space, you can't travel too far away.

Suddenly.

The Dao Ancestor's expression changed, and he found that he had been imprinted by the Void Void Technique.

"Oops!"

He realized something was wrong.

If it was usual, if someone used the Myriad Void Life Technique on him, he would definitely find out at the first time, but just now he had been running away, and all he wanted to live in his heart was, so he didn't pay much attention to the Myriad Void Life Technique.

"Broken!"

This Dao Ancestor incarnation instantly broke the mark of the Myriad Void Life Technique.

But at this moment, through the spatial crack in front of him, a figure walked out and looked at him with a sneer.

This person is Ye Tian! He chased after him!
